question_head: Here are a number of statements that may or may not apply to you. There are no right or wrong answers, so just answer honestly, considering how you compare to most people.
inst1:
Grit Scale

This questionnaire measures perseverance and passion for long-term goals.

For each statement, indicate how well it describes you by selecting the response that best fits.

Click NEXT to begin.
grit2: I have overcome setbacks to conquer an important challenge.
grit3: New ideas and projects sometimes distract me from previous ones.
grit5: My interests change from year to year.
grit7: I have been obsessed with a certain idea or project for a short time but later lost interest.
grit9: I often set a goal but later choose to pursue a different one.
grit10: I have difficulty maintaining my focus on projects that take more than a few months to complete.
grit14: I have achieved a goal that took years of work.
grit16: I become interested in new pursuits every few months.
debrief:
Thank you for completing the Grit Scale!

Your responses have been recorded.

Grit reflects your perseverance and passion for long-term goals. Higher scores indicate greater grit.

Click OK to continue.
